text.title: Controller and Service Tests
text.summary: @WebMvcTest controller slice tests and @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension) service unit tests for Spring Boot 3.x.

rule.statement: Use @WebMvcTest for controller tests; @MockBean the service; never spin up the full application context for controller slices.
rule.rationale: @WebMvcTest loads only the web layer, making tests fast and focused. Full context startup is slow and couples the test to unrelated beans.

rule.statement: Use @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension) for service unit tests; require Testcontainers for repository integration tests — do not use H2 in-memory.
rule.rationale: H2 hides PostgreSQL-specific behavior (JSON types, full-text, case sensitivity). Testcontainers brings a real database to CI without managing infrastructure.
